title: sisymbrium austriacum subsp. contortum
intro: Sisymbrium austriacum subsp. contortum, also known as Austrian fumewort or fumewort, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its yellow flowers and hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Sisymbrium austriacum subsp. contortum include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
